problem id: 93955d17
category: bit_manipulation

rule: (ROT(7) AND SHR(2)) XOR SHL(6)

examples:
  11100101 -> 01110000
  11110111 -> 11111001
  11010100 -> 00100000
  11011100 -> 00100110
  00110111 -> 11001001
  00000010 -> 10000000
  00011010 -> 10000100
  00011101 -> 01000110

query: 01011010
predicted answer: 10000100
